dict.string: Scan needs the camera to read 1D and 2D barcodes such as QR, EAN, UPC, Code 128, PDF417, Aztec and Data Matrix.
Scan can save a scanned vCard or MECARD as a new entry in your Contacts. You'll be shown the system 'New Contact' form first and can edit or cancel before saving.
Scan can save the codes you generate to your Photos library so you can print or share them later.
Scan can add events from a scanned iCalendar QR to your calendar. You'll be shown the system 'Add Event' sheet first and can edit or cancel before saving.
Scan can add events from a scanned iCalendar QR to your calendar. The app only needs write access — it never reads your existing events.
